narrative:
Richland Township has 2,206 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.0 percentage points.
